name: GLACIER BANCORP, INC.
summary: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. (GBCI) is a bank holding company. Based on this filing excerpt, which is an auditor consent (Exhibit 23) from Forvis Mazars, LLP, limited operational details are provided. The filing confirms consolidated financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025, with auditor reports dated February 25, 2026, covering financial statements and internal control over financial reporting effectiveness.

partnerships.description: Independent registered public accounting firm providing audit and attestation services for Glacier Bancorp's consolidated financial statements and internal controls.
